text:
The Acupuncture Pendant 
Purpose and Design The Acupuncture Pendant has been designed to support meridian function, helping 
individuals manage stress associated with modern living. Meridians—long 
acknowledged in traditional Asian medicine—serve as channels that link the body to 
the quantum field, providing access to vital information about cellular and organ 
function. Historically, practices such as nutrition, exercise, meditation, and 
acupuncture have been recommended for maintaining good health. Modern Challenges to Meridian Health Today’s high emotional stress, limited movement, and less-than-ideal diets may cause 
disruptions such as meridian stagnation or overactivity. The pendant offers support for 
emotional well-being during times when life becomes difficult. The pendant is 
designed as a supplementary aid to keep our body systems flowing. Design, Durability, and Care Made from durable stainless steel, the CTB Pendant is both comfortable and 
convenient to use. It can be easily cleaned with standard soap and water. The infusion 
remains effective unless the metal is melted. The pendant is not affected by airport 
scanners or wireless routers, and there is no evidence that its efficacy diminishes over 
time. Relationship Between Meridians, Muscles, and Organs Meridian pathways are closely associated with the performance of muscles and 
organs. Obstructions may cause muscle trigger points, incomplete muscle 
engagement, postural misalignment, joint irregularities, or nerve discomfort. Organs, 
such as the spleen, rely on meridian input for proper functioning. For instance, the 
spleen meridian plays a role in maintaining immune equilibrium, and imbalances may 
be linked to autoimmune conditions. Mechanism of Action Utilizing quantum-infused technology, the pendant emits harmonizing energy that 
sustains a connection between the quantum field and the individual meridians. This 
steady energy bolsters meridian activation and supports overall wellness.

Ordering Information The CTB Pendant costs 60.00€ plus shipping. To place an order, please email 
qatbylw@gmail.com with your mailing details. You will receive a payment link through 
Wise. Bulk discounts are available for ten or more pendants. ETC This device functions without any electronics, batteries, or wiring. Each pendant features a hole to attach chains or cords. Appropriate for all ages and suitable for pets. Works with other QAT pendants: The Life pendant supports mitochondria, organs, and 
glands, promoting rejuvenation and reducing the impact of EMFs from cell phones, 
cell towers, routers, and other electrical fields. The Connect to the Brain (CTB) 
pendant enhances coordination by restoring neuro-muscular connections to your 
muscles and joints.
